groups.name: kafka.consumer
groups.description: Custom Kafka consumer configuration (application-level, not Spring's spring.kafka.consumer).

groups.name: outbox.scheduler.pending
groups.description: Scheduler settings for processing PENDING outbox events.

groups.name: outbox.scheduler.retry
groups.description: Scheduler settings for retrying FAILED outbox events.

groups.name: outbox.scheduler.stuck
groups.description: Scheduler settings for detecting STUCK outbox events.

groups.name: outbox.cleanup
groups.description: Cleanup scheduler settings for removing processed outbox events.

groups.name: outbox.cleanup.dead-letter
groups.description: Cleanup scheduler settings for archiving dead-letter outbox events.

properties.name: kafka.topics.transactions
properties.description: Kafka topic name for transaction events.

properties.name: kafka.topics.payments
properties.description: Kafka topic name for payment events.

properties.name: kafka.topics.embargo
properties.description: Kafka topic name for embargo events.

properties.name: kafka.consumer.group-id
properties.description: Kafka consumer group ID used in @KafkaListener annotations.

properties.name: outbox.scheduler.pending.fixed-delay
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between executions of the pending events scheduler.

properties.name: outbox.scheduler.pending.initial-delay
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first execution of the pending events scheduler.

properties.name: outbox.scheduler.retry.fixed-delay
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between executions of the failed events retry scheduler.

properties.name: outbox.scheduler.retry.initial-delay
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first execution of the retry scheduler.

properties.name: outbox.scheduler.stuck.fixed-delay
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between executions of the stuck events detection scheduler.

properties.name: outbox.scheduler.stuck.initial-delay
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first execution of the stuck events scheduler.

properties.name: outbox.scheduler.stuck.threshold-minutes
properties.description: Age threshold in minutes after which an in-progress outbox event is considered stuck.

properties.name: outbox.cleanup.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the processed events cleanup job.

properties.name: outbox.cleanup.dead-letter.cron
properties.description: Cron expression for the dead-letter events archive job.
